title: Initializing string in struct along with numeric value throw Internal Error

features.name: struct with logic and string members
features.description: Code should include a struct typedef containing both a logic vector member and a string member

features.name: struct pattern initialization with unsized literal
features.description: Code should include a struct pattern initialization using unbased unsized literal '1 as a field value

features.name: struct pattern initialization with string literal
features.description: Code should include a struct pattern initialization with a string literal value for a string-typed field
